comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Implemented Tau fix: /ralph nuke now discovers Ralph-owned loop state by raw JSON kind/taskId without schema decoding, so stale Ralph state can be removed. It deletes only matching Ralph state/task artifacts, preserves non-Ralph loop data, and skips phase/run directory removal for unsafe raw task ids. Added regressions for stale invalid Ralph state, unsafe raw task ids preserving non-Ralph phase/run data, and legacy .pi/ralph-only nuke. Stabilized agents-settings temp roots to avoid ambient /tmp/.pi settings. Validation: npm run gate passed in extensions/tau (15 existing lint warnings, 0 errors; 97 test files, 659 tests passed). Review agent approved with no P0/P1 findings.
